description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a blocky, low-poly design, featuring angular limbs and simplified anatomical details. The figure is dressed in a long-sleeved top and loose-fitting pants, both rendered in a geometric, faceted style. The shoes are robust and appear to be designed for walking, with thick soles and a strap detail across the top. The hands are visible and relaxed at the sides, and the head is not shown in these views. The overall build suggests an average adult physique, with a casual, everyday urban outfit. The materials and finish give the figure a matte, non-reflective appearance, suitable for use in digital urban environments.
description: A blocky, stylized adult pedestrian in casual, loose-fitting clothing and sturdy shoes, rendered in a low-poly, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full legs, shoes, and relaxed hand position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular profile of the legs and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the legs and shoes, with visible pant creases.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the geometric shape of the pants and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved top and loose-fitting pants in a casual style
